title: agent-ssh normalized machine registry record
description: The normalized shape every consuming registry maps onto. The core renders `Host <name>` blocks from these. A transport's own config schema MAY extend this (e.g. add proxy_command_binary). PUBLIC contract.

transport.description: Dispatch key: which transport module carries these machines (e.g. 'cloudflare', 'dtssh', 'direct'). Selects the module.yaml + the fragment the records land in.

proxy_command_binary.description: Optional override of the transport's proxy_binary_default (e.g. 'cloudflared.exe' for WSL->Windows interop).

gate.description: topology=jumpbox only: the single fronting host the others ProxyJump through.

name.description: Host alias consumers reach by name: `ssh <name>`.

hostname.description: Transport-resolved reachable hostname (INJECTED by the consuming registry).

options.description: Verbatim SSH option passthrough (StrictHostKeyChecking, IdentitiesOnly, RemoteForward, MACs, ...).
